nasb.text: Men came from all peoples to hear the wisdom of Solomon, from all the kings of the earth who had heard of his wisdom.

esv.text: And people of all nations came to hear the wisdom of Solomon, and from all the kings of the earth, who had heard of his wisdom.

cnv.text: 萬族之中和地上列王之中，聽聞所羅門的智慧的，都有人來聽所羅門的智慧。

ccb.text: 天下列王风闻所罗门的智慧，都纷纷遣使来求教。
